_doc.purpose: Single source of truth for tier -> {min_vram_gb, recommended_provider, default_*_gpu, notes}.
_doc.rule: If --provider is not set, run-on-cloud.sh picks tiers[$TIER].recommended_provider. min_vram_gb is the hard floor: dispatch refuses to provision a GPU below it.

0_8b.notes: 0.8B fits in 8GB at int4. Run locally; cloud is overkill. Cloud fallback uses the cheapest 24GB+ card.

2b.notes: 2B fp16 SFT fits on a 24GB consumer card. Vast RTX 4090 is the cheap path.

4b.notes: 4B fp16 SFT needs 40GB+. A100-40 / L40S 48GB / H100 80GB on Vast; H200 on Nebius.

9b.notes: 9B fp16 SFT needs ~80GB peak. H100 80GB / H200 / A100-80. Single GPU.

27b.notes: 27B fp16 SFT needs 141GB+ for activations + optimizer state. H200 141GB single, or 2x H100 80GB with FSDP. Nebius 8x H200 preset is the no-fuss path; expensive.
